about.title: About Daikin Indonesia
about.subtitle: Building a sustainable future through air technology since 1976.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To deliver innovative air conditioning solutions that enhance comfort, improve air quality, and support environmental sustainability across Indonesia.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To be Indonesia's most trusted air solutions partner, recognized for excellence in technology, service, and environmental responsibility.

group.title: Daikin Group
group.subtitle: A global leader in air conditioning technology, present in over 170 countries.

history.title: Our History
history.subtitle: A journey of innovation and growth spanning over five decades in Indonesia.

timeline.1976: PT Daikin Airconditioning Indonesia established in Jakarta.
timeline.1985: First manufacturing facility opened, beginning local production.
timeline.1995: Nationwide dealer network reaches 200 authorized partners.
timeline.2008: Launch of inverter technology line for Indonesian market.
timeline.2015: Introduction of Streamer Technology for air purification.
timeline.2020: Digital transformation - online dealer locator and e-catalogue launched.
timeline.2024: 50,000+ active dealer network across all 34 provinces.

philosophy.title: Brand Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: The values that guide everything we do.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.body: Continuously pushing the boundaries of air technology to deliver better solutions.

quality.title: Quality
quality.body: Uncompromising standards in every product we design, manufacture, and deliver.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.body: Committed to reducing environmental impact through energy-efficient products.

people.title: People
people.body: Putting customers and communities at the heart of every decision.

technology.title: Technology & Innovation
technology.subtitle: The advanced technologies that set Daikin apart.

inverter.title: Inverter Technology
inverter.body: Daikin's variable-speed inverter compressor adjusts output to match room conditions, delivering up to 50% energy savings compared to conventional units.

refrigerant.title: R-32 Refrigerant
refrigerant.body: Our transition to R-32 refrigerant reduces environmental impact with a Global Warming Potential two-thirds lower than the previous R-410A standard.

streamer.title: Streamer Technology
streamer.body: Exclusive high-speed plasma discharge technology that actively decomposes harmful substances, allergens, and odors.

coanda.title: Coanda Airflow
coanda.body: Intelligent airflow design that distributes cool air evenly across the room, eliminating cold spots.

streamer.title: Streamer Technology
streamer.subtitle: Daikin's breakthrough air purification technology.
streamer.step1: Plasma discharge unit generates high-speed electron streams
streamer.step2: Electrons decompose harmful pollutants at the molecular level
streamer.step3: Clean, purified air is circulated back into the room

benefits.allergens: Decomposes pollen and dust mite allergens

awards.title: Awards & Certifications
awards.subtitle: Recognition of our commitment to excellence and innovation.
